meaning: adj.不规则形状的,不整齐牙齿状的,[植]啮蚀状的
examples: Petal margin entire or shortly fimbriate and erose proximally.
The erose buttons seen here are typical Kone installations, as well as the interior design.
At the early phase of FFA, the configuration of classic CNV is clew-like in eyes with pathological myopia and CEC, and erose in eyes with AMD.
